lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਸੀ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਲਦਿ ਨ ਚਲਿਆ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raasee baaharaa lad na chaliaa koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without capital, no one has ever departed with profit. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦੁ ਵਪਾਰੀ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bed vapaaree giaan raas karamee palai hoe |
lines.english: The Vedas are only merchants; spiritual wisdom is the capital; by His Grace, it is received.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸੀਅਰੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰਿ ਵਿਸਾਹੀਐ ਬਹੁ ਦੂਧੁ ਪੀਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: biseear mantr visaaheeai bahu doodh peeaeaa |
lines.english: You can feed a venomous snake lots of milk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਮੁ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਬਹੁ ਸੰਚੀਐ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ninm birakh bahu sancheeai amrit ras paaeaa |
lines.english: You can water a bitter neem tree with ambrosial nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਿੰਚੀਐ ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bikh meh amrit sincheeai bikh kaa fal paaeaa |
lines.english: Irrigating a poisonous plant with ambrosial nectar, only poisonous fruit is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਭਿੰਨੁ ਨ ਭਿਜਈ ਪਥਰੁ ਨਾਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh abhin na bhijee pathar naavaaeaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is resistant; he cannot be softened. You might as well water a stone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣਿ ਨ ਮੂਰਤੁ ਪੁਛਿਆ ਪੁਛੀ ਥਿਤਿ ਨ ਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maran na moorat puchhiaa puchhee thit na vaar |
lines.english: Death does not ask the time; it does not ask the date or the day of the week.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਭ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak sangat mel har sabh bikh leh jaaeaa |16|
lines.english: O Lord, please unite Nanak with the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, so that he may be rid of all poison. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੋਈ ਸਾਖਤੀ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੋਈ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa hoee saakhatee ikanaa hoee saar |
lines.english: Some are severely punished, and some are taken care of.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑੀ ਲਦਿਆ ਇਕਿ ਲਦਿ ਚਲੇ ਇਕਨੑੀ ਬਧੇ ਭਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaee ladiaa ik lad chale ikanaee badhe bhaar |
lines.english: Some have packed up, and some who have packed up have gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਸਕਰ ਸਣੈ ਦਮਾਮਿਆ ਛੁਟੇ ਬੰਕ ਦੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: lasakar sanai damaamiaa chhutte bank duaar |
lines.english: They must leave their armies and drums, and their beautiful mansions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਢੇਰੀ ਛਾਰੁ ਕੀ ਭੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੋਈ ਛਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak dteree chhaar kee bhee fir hoee chhaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the pile of dust is once again reduced to dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀਤਰਿ ਚੋਰੁ ਬਹਾਲਿਆ ਖੋਟੁ ਵੇ ਜੀਆ ਖੋਟੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bheetar chor bahaaliaa khott ve jeea khott |2|
lines.english: The thief has settled within you; O soul, your life is false. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਢੇਰੀ ਢਹਿ ਪਈ ਮਿਟੀ ਸੰਦਾ ਕੋਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak dteree dteh pee mittee sandaa kott |
lines.english: O Nanak, the pile shall fall apart; the fortress of the body is made of dust.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਕਰੂਪ ਦੁਖੀਏ ਸਦਾ ਕਾਲੇ ਮੁਹ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa karoop dukhee sadaa kaale muh maaeaa |
lines.english: They are totally ugly, and always in pain. Their faces are blackened by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਦੁਸਟੁ ਹੈ ਨਕ ਵਢੇ ਨਕ ਵਢਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin andar nindaa dusatt hai nak vadte nak vadtaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who are filled with vicious slander, shall have their noses cut, and be shamed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਤ ਕਰਹੁ ਰਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo tin kee sangat mat karahu rakh lehu har raaeaa |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, let me not even associate with them; save me from them, O my Sovereign Lord King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲਕੇ ਉਠਿ ਨਿਤ ਪਰ ਦਰਬੁ ਹਿਰਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੁਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhalake utth nit par darab hireh har naam churaaeaa |
lines.english: They rise early in the morning, to cheat and steal from others; they hide from the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak peiai kirat kamaavade manamukh dukh paaeaa |17|
lines.english: O Nanak, the self-willed manmukhs act according to their past deeds, producing nothing but pain. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukam pachhaanai khasam kaa taa sach paavai koe |
lines.english: Only by realizing the Hukam of His Command, is Truth obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਬੁਰਾ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap pachhaaneeai buraa na deesai koe |
lines.english: The Gurmukh realizes his own self; no one appears evil to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਹੈ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਖਸਮਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh koee hai khasam kaa khasamahu sabh ko hoe |
lines.english: Everyone belongs to our Lord and Master. Everyone came from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਹਿਲਾ ਆਇਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam dhiaaeeai sahilaa aaeaa soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. Fruitful is his coming into the world. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad mile na vichhurreh jinaa seviaa har daataar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are united with the Word of the Shabad; serving the Lord, the Great Giver, they shall never be separated from Him again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa daataa aap hai aape melanahaar |
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of all; He unites all with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਤੀਰਥ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap teerath sanjam kare mere prabh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Chanting and meditation, penance and self-discipline, and bathing at sacred shrines of pilgrimage - the merits of these come by pleasing my God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੈ ਨਾਉ ਉਗਵਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hiradai saant hai naau ugav aaeaa |
lines.english: Peace and tranquility fill the heart of the Gurmukh; the Name wells up within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਏਵੈ ਭਾਵਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mere har jeeo evai bhaavadaa guramukh taraaeaa |
lines.english: My Dear Lord is pleased by this; he carries the Gurmukh across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦਾ ਸੁਧੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hiradaa sudh har sevade soheh gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: So serve the Lord with a pure heart; singing His Glorious Praises, you shall be embellished and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਿਅਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh melian har dar sohaaeaa |18|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is merged with the Lord; he is embellished in His Court. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਵੰਤਾ ਇਵ ਹੀ ਕਹੈ ਅਵਰੀ ਧਨ ਕਉ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhanavantaa iv hee kahai avaree dhan kau jaau |
lines.english: Thus speaks the wealthy man: I should go and get more wealth.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰਜੁ ਚੜੈ ਵਿਜੋਗਿ ਸਭਸੈ ਘਟੈ ਆਰਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: sooraj charrai vijog sabhasai ghattai aarajaa |
lines.english: The sun rises and sets, and the lives of all run out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak niradhan tith din jit din visarai naau |1|
lines.english: Nanak becomes poor on that day when he forgets the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਭਰਿਆ ਫੂਕਿ ਆਖਣਿ ਕਹਣਿ ਨ ਥੰਮੑੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko bhariaa fook aakhan kehan na thamaeeai |
lines.english: Everyone is puffed up with pride; even after they are spoken to, they do not stop.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਭੋਗਿ ਕੋਈ ਹਾਰੈ ਕੋ ਜਿਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: tan man rataa bhog koee haarai ko jinai |
lines.english: The mind and body experience pleasures; one loses, and another wins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਫੂਕ ਕਢਾਏ ਢਹਿ ਪਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vekhai aap fook kadtaae dteh pavai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself sees all; when He takes the air out of the balloon, the body falls. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਥਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat naam nidhaan hai jithahu har paaeaa |
lines.english: The treasure of the Name is in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. There, the Lord is found.
